_comment_intranet_http: Intranet HTTP deployment, CLIENT side. Replace 'kb-server.lan' with your server's hostname or IP. If you front kb-mcp with nginx for TLS/auth, switch to https:// and the proxy URL. No kb-mcp binary is required on the client — any HTTP-capable MCP client speaks Streamable HTTP.
_comment_alwaysLoad: alwaysLoad: true is a Claude Code v2.1.121+ option that ensures kb-mcp's tools are present at initial load (skips tool-search lookup latency). Other MCP clients (Cursor, etc.) ignore the field. The startup cost is negligible here because the heavy lifting happens server-side; safe to keep enabled.
